glosses.ja: メモする; 書き留める

sentences.target: Ich muss mir die Nummer notieren.

translations.de: Ich muss mir die Nummer notieren.
translations.en: I have to write down the number.
translations.vi: Tôi phải ghi lại số đó.
translations.ja: 番号を書き留めないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1st sg) selecting the infinitive 'notieren'; expresses necessity.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, dative; beneficiary/indirect object (reflexive-like dative) with 'notieren'.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner for 'Nummer'.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of 'notieren'.
Main verb in infinitive; complement of the modal 'muss'; non-separable, transitive verb.

sentences.target: Sie will den Termin im Kalender notieren.
sentences.reading: /ziː vɪl deːn tɛʁˈmiːn ɪm kaˈlɛndɐ noˈtiːʁən/

translations.de: Sie will den Termin im Kalender notieren.
translations.ipa: /ziː vɪl deːn tɛʁˈmiːn ɪm kaˈlɛndɐ noˈtiːʁən/
translations.en: She wants to write down the appointment in the calendar.
translations.es: Ella quiere apuntar la cita en el calendario.
translations.fr: Elle veut noter le rendez-vous dans le calendrier.
translations.ko: 약속을 달력에 적어 두고 싶어 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 她想把预约记在日历上。
translations.yue: 佢想喺日曆度記低個預約。
translations.ru: Она хочет записать встречу в календарь.
translations.pt: Ela quer anotar o compromisso no calendário.
translations.he: היא רוצה לרשום את התור ביומן.
translations.vi: Cô ấy muốn ghi cuộc hẹn vào lịch.
translations.ar: تريد أن تدوّن الموعد في التقويم.
translations.nl: Ze wil de afspraak in de agenda zetten.
translations.uk: Вона хоче занотувати зустріч у календарі.
translations.hu: Fel akarja írni az időpontot a naptárba.
translations.hi: वह कैलेंडर में अपॉइंटमेंट लिखना चाहती है।
translations.el: Θέλει να σημειώσει το ραντεβού στο ημερολόγιο.
translations.nb: Hun vil skrive inn avtalen i kalenderen.
translations.id: Dia ingin mencatat janji itu di kalender.
translations.sv: Hon vill skriva in tiden i kalendern.
translations.ro: Vrea să noteze programarea în calendar.
translations.cs: Chce si zapsat schůzku do kalendáře.
translations.da: Hun vil skrive aftalen ind i kalenderen.
translations.ja: 彼女は予定をカレンダーに書き込みたい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative; subject. Ambiguous: 3rd person singular feminine or polite 2nd person (formal).
Modal auxiliary (present, 3rd sg) selecting the infinitive 'notieren'; expresses volition.
Definite article, masculine singular accusative; determiner for 'Termin'.
Common noun, masculine singular accusative; direct object of 'notieren'.
Fused contraction of 'in dem' (ADP+DET); preposition governing dative; marks location.
Common noun, masculine singular dative; object of the preposition 'im'.
Main verb in infinitive; complement of the modal 'will'; non-separable, transitive verb.

translations.en: We should write down the shopping list.
translations.es: Deberíamos anotar la lista de la compra.
translations.fr: On devrait noter la liste des courses.
translations.it: Dovremmo scrivere la lista della spesa.
translations.ko: 장보기 목록을 적어 두는 게 좋겠어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们应该把购物清单记下来。
translations.yue: 我哋應該寫低購物清單。
translations.pt: Devemos anotar a lista de compras.
translations.vi: Chúng ta nên ghi lại danh sách mua sắm.
translations.hi: हमें खरीदारी की सूची लिख लेनी चाहिए।
translations.el: Πρέπει να σημειώσουμε τη λίστα με τα ψώνια.
translations.ro: Ar trebui să notăm lista de cumpărături.
translations.cs: Měli bychom si zapsat nákupní seznam.
translations.ja: 買い物リストを書き留めておこう。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (1st pl); form corresponds to past indicative or Konjunktiv II; here used as advisory 'should'; selects infinitive 'notieren'.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner for 'Einkaufsliste'.
Compound common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of 'notieren'.
Main verb in infinitive; complement of the modal 'sollten'; non-separable, transitive verb.

sentences.target: Er kann den Namen schnell notieren.

translations.de: Er kann den Namen schnell notieren.
translations.en: He can quickly write down the name.
translations.es: Él puede anotar el nombre rápidamente.
translations.fr: Il peut noter le nom rapidement.
translations.ko: 그는 이름을 빨리 적을 수 있다.
translations.pt: Ele pode anotar o nome rapidamente.
translations.he: הוא יכול לרשום את השם מהר.
translations.vi: Anh ấy có thể ghi tên nhanh.
translations.nl: Hij kan de naam snel opschrijven.
translations.hu: Gyorsan le tudja írni a nevet.
translations.hi: वह नाम जल्दी लिख सकता है।
translations.el: Μπορεί να σημειώσει γρήγορα το όνομα.
translations.nb: Han kan raskt skrive ned navnet.
translations.id: Dia bisa mencatat nama itu dengan cepat.
translations.sv: Han kan snabbt skriva ner namnet.
translations.da: Han kan hurtigt skrive navnet ned.
translations.fi: Hän voi nopeasti kirjoittaa nimen ylös.
translations.ja: 彼はすぐに名前を書き留められる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 3rd sg) selecting the infinitive 'notieren'; expresses ability.
Definite article, masculine singular accusative; determiner for 'Namen'.
Common noun, masculine singular accusative; direct object of 'notieren'.
Adverb modifying the manner of 'notieren'.
Main verb in infinitive; complement of the modal 'kann'; non-separable, transitive verb.

app_payload.word_ja: メモする; 書き留める
jp: Ich muss mir die Nummer notieren.
Sie will den Termin im Kalender notieren.
Er kann den Namen schnell notieren.
fu: /ziː vɪl deːn tɛʁˈmiːn ɪm kaˈlɛndɐ noˈtiːʁən/

en: I have to write down the number.
She wants to write down the appointment in the calendar.
We should write down the shopping list.
He can quickly write down the name.
